title: Sing To The Stars

sections.label: Intro
lines: Sing to the stars, a new song tonight,
Let the heavens dance, let the universe ignite.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: From the mountains high to the oceans wide,
All the earth rejoice, let your hearts collide.
Declare His greatness, let His glory shine,
The splendor of His works, forever divine.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: The skies proclaim it, the seas roar loud,
The forests whisper, the trees bow proud.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Sing to the stars, let your voice ascend,
Shout to the heavens, His praise won’t end.
Joy unending, a radiant sound,
Glory and power all creation resounds!

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Every nation rise, bring your offering,
Honor and strength to the eternal King.
In His presence bow, trembling in awe,
The justice of His hand, His perfect law.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: The skies proclaim it, the seas roar loud,
The forests whisper, the trees bow proud.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Sing to the stars, let your voice ascend,
Shout to the heavens, His praise won’t end.
Joy unending, a radiant sound,
Glory and power all creation resounds!

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Let the earth rejoice, let the skies align,
Before His throne, the King divine.
He reigns with love, in truth and might,
His justice glows like the morning light.

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: Sing to the stars, let your voice ascend,
Shout to the heavens, His praise won’t end.
Joy unending, a radiant sound,
Glory and power all creation resounds!

sections.label: Outro
lines: Let the heavens dance, let the universe ignite,
Sing to the stars, a new song tonight.

epigraph: O sing unto the LORD a new song
